sections.title: Let's get started
sections.subtitle: A couple of quick questions before we dive in.

questions.text: Is this a gift for someone, or is it for yourself?

questions.placeholder: e.g. Mum & Dad, The Hendersons, Sarah

questions.text: Tell us everything about them — the more you share, the better the questions
questions.sublabel: This is the most important question in the whole wizard. The personal category will be built entirely from what you write here.
questions.placeholder: e.g. Mum and Dad have been married for 35 years. Dad proposed at the Eiffel Tower but nearly dropped the ring...
questions.hint: Memories, stories, habits, preferences, arguments, in-jokes, shared experiences — all of it is useful.

questions.text: Tell us about your group — the more detail you give, the more personal the questions
questions.sublabel: This is the heart of your game. The personal category will be built entirely from what you write here.
questions.placeholder: e.g. Four friends from Bristol who've known each other since school...
questions.hint: Names, memories, habits, obsessions, in-jokes — nothing is too small.

sections.title: How hands-on do you want to be?
sections.subtitle: You can always change your mind as you go.

questions.text: How would you like to build your game?

options.label: Keep it simple
options.sublabel: Give us the basics and our AI handles the rest. Done in under 5 minutes.

options.label: Start me off, I'll adjust
options.sublabel: We'll pre-fill suggestions — you tweak what matters. Recommended.

options.label: I want full control
options.sublabel: You review and edit every question and category yourself.

sections.title: Your game
sections.subtitle: The basics that go on the box and board.

questions.text: What would you like to call the game?
questions.placeholder: e.g. Know Your Hendersons, The Emma & Jack Files, Legends Quiz
questions.generate_prompt: Suggest a creative trivia game name. Offer 3 options.

questions.text: How would you describe the overall theme or world of this game?
questions.placeholder: e.g. our 10-year relationship, the Henderson family, 90s kids, life in Dublin
questions.hint: This shapes the non-personal categories so they feel relevant.

sections.title: How should it look?
sections.subtitle: Set the visual direction for your board and card decks.

options.label: Retro & Vintage
options.description: Warm tones, serif type, old-school charm

questions.freeform_label: Or describe it in your own words
questions.freeform_placeholder: e.g. like a Wes Anderson film, cosy and warm, bold and colourful

questions.sublabel: Pick up to 3. We'll build the category colour system around these.
questions.generate_prompt: Suggest a 3-colour palette fitting the theme and style.

sections.title: Who's playing?
sections.subtitle: Player names and interests help us personalise the questions.

questions.placeholder: Type a name and press Enter

questions.text: Any interests, hobbies, or passions the group shares?
questions.placeholder: e.g. Formula 1, hiking, 80s music, terrible reality TV, cooking, Arsenal FC
questions.hint: These help us tailor the Sports & Leisure and Pop Culture categories to your group.

questions.text: How hard should the questions be?

options.label: Easy — fun for everyone, no one gets left behind
Balanced — a good mix, something for everyone
Hard — we take trivia seriously around here

sections.title: Customise your categories
sections.subtitle: Review and rename your six categories. Edit or regenerate any questions.

questions.sublabel: We've suggested names for each of your 6 categories. Edit any that don't feel right.
questions.generate_prompt: Name 6 trivia categories for the game theme and players.

questions.sublabel: We've generated 30 questions per category (180 total). Edit, delete, or regenerate any you'd like to change.
questions.generate_prompt: Generate trivia questions for the category, theme, and difficulty.

questions.sublabel: These appear on penalty spaces. We've written 10 themed forfeits — edit freely.
questions.generate_prompt: Generate 10 fun, themed forfeit prompts for the trivia game.

sections.title: Almost there
sections.subtitle: Last chance to add anything before we show you your game.

questions.text: Anything else you'd like us to know?
questions.placeholder: e.g. Please don't include questions about football. Make the personal questions funny, not sentimental.

questions.sublabel_digital: You'll receive a companion page URL and downloadable print files.
questions.sublabel_physical: Your fully printed game will be manufactured and shipped to you.

preview.title: Here's a taste of your game
preview.description: A sample of what's coming — the full question set gets built after you order.
